title: Large BTC Whale Activity Detected on Binance
summary: Multiple on-chain analytics platforms detect significant BTC accumulation by large holders, potential market signal

decision.reason: Passed candidate gate. Confidence=0.68 (≥0.50), Score=58 (≥40), Source=coindesk (tier_1). Signal viable. Escalating to QuantLab review queue.

state_transitions.reason: Candidate gate accepted signal — meets minimum viability, ready for human review

metadata.notes: Example fixture showing candidate acceptance. Demonstrates medium-high confidence + acceptable score → review queue. Human judgment needed to confirm trading implication.
